## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Quality & Compliance Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project (JSDoc, strict mode).
- [ ] I have verified that all dynamic content rendering is performed using secure DOM APIs (`createElement`, `textContent`) rather than `innerHTML`.
- [ ] My changes satisfy WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility guidelines (tested contrast ratios and keyboard controls).
- [ ] I have run the QA Diagnostic Suite and all 4 audit modules report 100%.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes.
